name: population
description: On-box science-frame corpus → real headless wizard pipeline, process-per-frame. Generalizes tools/corpus/population_timing_run.mjs. Manifest built by lib/manifest.mjs v2 (correlated-set N=3 sampling + evidence-derived timeouts).

manifest.comment: Enumerate the samples root resolved by lib/env.mjs (TESTKIT_SAMPLES; Windows heavy-root default resolved inside env.mjs, ROOT/'Sample Files' junction elsewhere). Drive-literal-free here on purpose.
